description: This collection consists of those NYU websites (Office of the Registrar and the individual Schools within the University) that list course bulletins, course listings and course descriptions for all non-credit, undergraduate and graduate classes. This Collection does not contain any course information for NYU Abu Dhabi and the School of Medicine.
